rows.title: New Public Meeting Portal Launched
rows.summary: The City of Longmont has launched a new public meeting portal, making it easier for residents to access and follow upcoming meetings and topics. This portal will enhance civic engagement by providing detailed agendas and video recordings.
rows.why_flagged: The portal improves transparency and accessibility of city governance information, which is crucial for local residents and stakeholders.
rows.suggested_next_step: Review the new portal to assess its features and usability for potential stories on improved civic engagement.

rows.title: New City Council Meeting Portal
rows.summary: The City of Longmont has launched a new Public Meeting Portal, providing easy access to agendas and meeting packets for the City Council and advisory boards.
rows.why_flagged: This portal will make it easier for residents to stay informed about city council meetings and topics, enhancing transparency.
rows.suggested_next_step: Review the new features and compare with previous methods of accessing meeting information.

rows.title: Upcoming City Council Meeting
rows.summary: The upcoming City Council meeting on July 7th is scheduled from 7 pm - 11 pm and includes an open forum for public input. This provides a platform for residents to engage in local governance.
rows.why_flagged: Residents can participate directly by providing feedback during the open forum, influencing future city policies and decisions.
rows.suggested_next_step: Alert community members about the upcoming meeting and encourage them to attend.

rows.title: City Council Meeting Schedule and Agendas
rows.summary: The City of Longmont provides detailed schedules, agendas, and live video recordings for its City Council meetings, allowing public participation in local governance.
rows.why_flagged: This resource is crucial for civic engagement as it enables residents to participate in decision-making processes that affect their community.
rows.suggested_next_step: Contact the city clerk or council members to highlight the importance of attending and participating in these meetings.

rows.title: Public Records Request Options
rows.summary: Residents can now submit public records requests via WhatsApp, expanding the accessibility of city data.
rows.why_flagged: This change enhances transparency and citizen engagement by providing an additional avenue for accessing important information held by the city.
rows.suggested_next_step: Verify with the city clerk's office that this new service is active and gather more details.

rows.title: Longmont Seeks Human Service Agency Funding
rows.summary: The City of Longmont is currently accepting applications for human service agency funding in preparation for the 2027 fiscal year. This call for proposals aims to support local organizations that provide critical services to residents.
rows.why_flagged: This opportunity for community-based organizations could significantly impact local social services and funding availability.
rows.source_name: City of Longmont Public Information Department
rows.suggested_next_step: Review the application details and reach out to key contacts for more information.

rows.title: City of Longmont Seeks Applications for Human Service Agency Funding
rows.summary: The City of Longmont is accepting applications for its Human Service Agency funding, which supports local organizations that provide essential services to community members.
rows.why_flagged: This information is important for local nonprofits and residents seeking support from the city.
rows.source_name: City of Longmont Public Information Department
rows.suggested_next_step: Reach out to key community organizations for interviews or quotes.
